programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about "on" and "off" by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.
programme.sub-title: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Ryan tries to be just like Barney but soon learns that he is special when he's being himself! Barney explains to Baby Bop that the word "no" can help you avoid making mistakes or getting hurt.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the Park Kids to play with her instead of working in a garden. RIFF plays detective to track down the source of a mysterious sound in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.
programme.sub-title: A Bird of a Different Feather

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game - Airplanes
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty and taking responsibility for what we do is always best. together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is surprised by the first day of cold weather, Barney helps her see that winter is a wonderful time. On a hot summer day, Barney teaches BJ about all the activities you can do in the summer.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller; she's convinced it's shrinking. But Barney shows her that, actually, she is growing. Baby Bop is not sure she likes this idea at first.
programme.sub-title: The Shrinking Blankey - Things I Can Do

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Venice, Anyone?
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Make Music
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ have fun learning about music, rhythm and musical instruments. Barney introduces many different instruments and BJ dreams of one day becoming a rock 'n roll star. They discover that music gives everyone a happy feelin.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend. Leah receives life altering news about her health. Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories. (S10, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley gives Bar an answer. Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months, forcing Bri to decide what is truly best for her daughter. (S10, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Level Up
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, after a Covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. (S10, ep24)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not Quite
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. (S10, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Full Circle
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. (S10, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: MIA
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous. Ashley struggles when she finds out she has to move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent. (S10, ep27)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Mutual Combat
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. (S10, ep28)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bonded for Life
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. (S10, ep29)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: On The Shoulders Of Giants
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behaviour wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about a lump. (S10, ep31)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Backslide
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road block. (S10, ep32)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Off The Leash
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces and threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumour. (S10, ep33)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Chelsea, Leah, Kail, Briana, and Jade sit down to unpack this season. Chelsea reveals to the other mums why she is leaving the show while Leah's ex-husbands address their contentious relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Dr. Drew and Nessa host as Briana returns after her blowup with Devoin and Kailyn speaks about her personal growth. Chelsea and Cole get emotional as they look back at Chelsea's incredible journey.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Briana's Family Secret
programme.desc: When Briana DeJesus finds out she has a secret teenage brother, her world is turned upside down. Will Briana be able to create a bond with her brother or will her family implode in the process?

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and Kail reflect on their growth over the last ten years while Jade and Briana discuss their traumatic experience in Miami. (S10, ep34)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and her daughters discuss their journey. Jade makes boundaries with her mum. Ashley and Bar break down how they overcome struggles and Tea gushes about Holly. (S10, ep35)

programme.title: Teen Mom: Taking It Slow
programme.desc: Maci confronts her ex about child support; Amber makes a choice; Catelynn and Tyler consider living together; and Farrah considers a big change.

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: A New Arrival
programme.desc: Brand new Teen Mom UK is back, and mums Chloe, Mia, Megan and Amber are being joined by a sassy newcomer. Get ready for tears, tantrums and true love with our tenacious Brit teen girls. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Relationship Woes
programme.desc: New mum Sassi chooses a surprising new career, Chloe clashes with her mum, Mia and Megan have relationship misery and for Amber, love is in the air. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Amber, Chloe and Mia have very different Valentine's Day experiences, Megan has her baby shower and Sassi and Darren reach breaking point. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2
programme.desc: Unseen moments from the episodes Brooke, Felicia, Emily, Markai, Aubrey, Christinna, Kayla, Megan, and Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Cleondra
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she faces the tough decision to leave home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla's anorexia comes back full-force when she is pregnant. While struggling to put looks aside, Kayla realizes that the person she has always relied on, her mother, refuses to support her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Izabella
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: Taylor's mum wants her to choose adoption, but Taylor and her boyfriend Nathan feel that they can overcome the challenges of being teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Allie
programme.desc: A Jersey girl is stuck in Texas after moving in with her boyfriend's dysfunctional family, Allie needs to decide whether to raise her baby in an unstable environment or without a dad.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts an emotional finale as ten teen mothers share a stage to come together with their boyfriends and parents and talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with the girls from season 3 of 16 And Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Adoption Special
programme.desc: Dr. Drew goes in depth and explores the adoption stories of Teen Mom's Catelynn and Tyler, and 16 and Pregnant's Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with the girls of 16 And Pregnant to find where they are now.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Mackenzie
programme.desc: Mackenzie has always lived in the moment, until she has to suddenly get serious about her own life when her boyfriend is nearly paralysed in a car accident just weeks before her due date.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Rest in Peace, Marina Garito
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead, the evidence and autopsy both suggest suicide, but Stella is unconvinced and risks her life to pursue the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Death House
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body, who are still trapped in the building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Second Chances
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flag On The Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Formula
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rest in Peace Marina Garito
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Redemption
programme.desc: Dr. Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Point of View
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behavior that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Deep
programme.desc: A sailboat race to Staten Island takes an unexpected tack when one of the boats nearly collides with a dead scuba diving instructor.

programme.title: CSI: New York: You Only Die Once
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a James Bond-esque gang of thieves who use high tech methods to steal personal account information from computers and phones before fleeing the scenes in a customized Batmobile-type car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: A murder victim bears a striking resemblance to a well-known avatar in the online role-playing game Second Life. Mac is forced to enter the game himself to solve the mystery surrounding her death. The assassin (Suspect X) escapes.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Buzzkill
programme.desc: When a supermodel is found dead in a giant martini glass on a Times Square billboard, Stella and Lindsay follow the evidence in search of the party crasher.

programme.title: CSI: New York: One Wedding and a Funeral
programme.desc: Mac, Danny and Hawkes investigates a groom murdered on his wedding day, found stuffed and wrapped like a wedding present. Stella and Lindsay investigate when a jigsaw covered in blood is left on Stella's car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Child's Play
programme.desc: Flack and Stella investigate a man killed by an exploding cigar. Danny and his neighbor Ruben stumble on a bodega robbery and the boy is killed by a stray bullet. Danny is filled with guilt because he was supposed to be responsible for the child.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Happily Never After
programme.desc: A notorious hotel owner known for her meanness is found dead under an ice sculpture, and the clues to the death of a second woman who fell to her death onto a school bus can be found in the book "Peter Pan."

programme.title: CSI: New York: Personal Foul
programme.desc: As the search for the "Cabbie Killer" continues, riding a cab gets very deadly. The team must figure out how to keep New York City safe.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Veritas
programme.desc: Immediately following the previous season finale, the team is investigating the death of a woman named Lauren Salinas who is linked to the bank robbery. She turns out to be a friend of Flack's sister Samantha.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Page Turner
programme.desc: When two people turn up dead with radiation poisoning, it sparks an urgent investigation before it turns into a deadly outbreak in New York City when it's tracked down to a book at the NYC Library.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Broken Home
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dead Air
programme.desc: The CSI team must locate a woman who has been kidnapped and dialed a wrong number on her cell phone. To locate her, the team must first figure out who the kidnapped woman was trying to contact.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Open Water
programme.desc: A cruise ship docked in Miami is the scene of a double murder. The team investigates the long list of potential suspects and soon the list is dramatically shortened when the CSI’s find a large amount of money missing from the victim’s stateroom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Shock
programme.desc: During an A-list house party, an heiress is found electrocuted in her own bathtub. The list of suspects includes her musician boyfriend, her assistant, and her main modelling rival.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Rampage
programme.desc: The Mala Noche gang trial is stopped when the defendant escapes with the help of a fake witness and a gunman in the audience. Delko finds that a beautiful but disturbed ex-lover is stalking any woman who he is now close too, including his sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko search Miami to bring down the Mala Noche gang once and for all. The quest to end the crime-spree is jeopardized when Federal agents, led by Agent Glen Cole, raid the CSI lab searching for missing cash evidence, based on an unknown tip.
programme.sub-title: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Death Pool 100
programme.desc: The murder of a young socialite could be connected to a death pool, an offshore gambling boat, and a counterfeiting ring.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Curse of the Coffin
programme.desc: Wolfe believes that he may have triggered a Santeria curse when he disturbs a miniature coffin at a murder scene.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: High Octane
programme.desc: The investigation into a beheading during a stunt at an automobile "sideshow" could ultimately expose a larger cover-up involving stolen cars and jet fuel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Darkroom
programme.desc: CSI steps up the search for potential serial killer who may be connected to a professional photographer after it discovers that Natalia's sister may be the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Come As You Are
programme.desc: The death of a Marine recruiter ultimately leads Horatio to open an investigation into the death of a soldier in Iraq. The soldier's brother claims responsibility, but Horatio suspects a cover-up.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex is found dead at his home, Horatio must step into the investigation to keep his team safe from an overeager investigator.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: No Man's Land
programme.desc: The robbery of a police truck containing confiscated weapons is connected to a plot to spring Clavo Cruz from prison, and one of the guns stolen in the robbery is used in the shooting of a young boy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Man Down
programme.desc: While the manhunt for Clavo Cruz continues, Delko fights for his life after the shooting.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A real estate developer is murdered, and the investigation uncovers a complex web of deceit involving his wife her two identical triplet sisters. But the apparently-murdered developer may have had a surprise of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rush
programme.desc: An actor is found dead in the trunk of a stunt car, but the investigation reveals that he actually died in his room at a high-profile celebrity rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Just Murdered
programme.desc: A far from amicable divorce comes to a bigger crisis when bodies start piling up, and Delko falls afoul of a former nemesis when he misses a payment.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Burned
programme.desc: While investigating a possible arson case, Horatio discovers that Yelina is back in Miami working as a private investigator. Meanwhile, Wolfe's prior relationship with one of the suspects gets him in hot water with his superiors.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Switch
programme.desc: While CSI tries to find out who killed a carjacker, Wolfe is forced to become an adversary as he takes a job as a television crime analyst.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dangerous Son
programme.desc: A probation officer is shot and killed, and one of the suspects turns out to be Horatio's biological son.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Topeka
programme.desc: In 2002 in Topeka, Kansas, newly engaged Michael Sisco and Karen Harkness were brutally shot from the foot of their bed while they slept.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly is given a voice-activated operating system as a gift and gets way too attached to him. Haskell comes into money and uses it to control Phil and Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly’s assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he’s got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn’t speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) is nervous when Holly (Kristen Johnston) starts dating his top client – basketball player Kevin Tyler (Amar'e Stoudemire). Haskell (Wayne Knight) lures Stuart (David Alan Basche) into the world of sports betting.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: The Blind Leading The Blind Date

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Wedding Deception
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix attend the wedding of an old college friend, Oscar aims to reconnect with an old flame while Felix is determined to show his ex-wife (guest star Christine Woods) that he's a changed man.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself
programme.desc: Felix's hypochondria kicks into overdrive when Oscar starts dating the most important person in Felix's life - his doctor. Erinn Hayes guest stars as Sharon.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Sleeping Dogs Lie
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix make a trip to Ashley's (Christine Woods) to retrieve Felix's special pillow, a secret that he has kept from Oscar is revealed. Five-time NBA All-Star Chris Webber guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Enlightening Strikes
programme.desc: When Felix substitute teaches a yoga class, his teaching style rubs everyone, including Emily, the wrong way. Weird Al Yankovic and Regis Philbin guest star.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Jealous Island
programme.desc: Oscar becomes obsessed with living up to Murph's (Geoff Stults) standards when he finds out the girl he is seeing used to date the handsome ex-baseball player.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Audit Couple
programme.desc: When the IRS decides to audit Oscar and his ex-wife Gaby, Felix offers to mediate between the contentious exes when he realizes that he might be the reason Oscar was audited in the first place.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All About Eavesdropping
programme.desc: After Oscar and Felix become obsessed with eavesdropping on their bickering neighbors, they try to subtly intervene and help them save their marriage.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Unger The Influence
programme.desc: With the help of Murph, Oscar decides to throw a big party when Felix finally agrees to spend the weekend away. Also, Felix and Emily have their first sleepover.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: From Here to Maturity
programme.desc: Oscar faces a personal dilemma when he dates a young nanny, Allyson (Brianne Howey) who works for his neighbor, Charlotte (Teri Hatcher).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Madison & Son
programme.desc: Oscar's dream comes true when he is asked to throw out the first pitch at a New York Mets game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Oscar's Overture
programme.desc: Oscar attempts to impress Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) by purchasing a table for a fundraiser to benefit The New York Philharmonic.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: An Oscar Named Desire
programme.desc: Oscar and Charlotte hit a speed bump when they hesitate to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Make Room For Dani
programme.desc: Oscar reluctantly agrees with his agent that it's time to shake things up on his radio show and allows Dani to have a bigger role after a rival host, Rich Eisen, taunts him.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: A Dinner Engagement
programme.desc: Felix attempts to reverse Emily's birthday curse and plans a nice dinner to celebrate with friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 96
programme.desc: Sisters who share a rollercoaster existance of ups and downs traded their beloved dog Mini and now that both are stable they need Judge Rhonda to decide who will provide Mini's forever home.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 74
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis over nude pictures and a mother's restraining order against her son's fiancee.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 61
programme.desc: A Mom on her last nerve with her lazy, unemployed son and his boyfriend comes to Judge Rhonda's court with a banged-up car and a plea for help.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 42
programme.desc: Cousins cross swords over a trip to the Hawaiian paradice that one claims was a long planned Birthday celebration and the other tells Judge Rhonda she received no details, so she didn't go.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 25
programme.desc: Sisters squabble over a loan to renovate a new film studio and drag their brother with them into Judge Rhonda's Court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 20
programme.desc: Brothers face the music, actually Hip Hop Jazz from an Alto Sax, over a loan for studio gear in Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 73
programme.desc: A motorcycle crash drives two close cousins into Judge Rhonda's courtroom because the younger one who "just wanted to be like Joe" could not keep up.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 69
programme.desc: A model says her cousin/manager is a thought out thief and Judge Rhonda must decide if his "extra" 20% commission is justified by her demands.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a family in crisis; mom and step dad claim their daughter is mentally unstable, uses drugs and steals from their company.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 30
programme.desc: Sisters who fall into financial ruin over a car purchased so one of them can visit her murdered son's grave bring the case to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 52
programme.desc: A tattoo "addiction" has drawn out the conflict between an older woman and her estranged young husband; Judge Rhonda inks them a solution.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 6
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda navigates the dispute between an estranged step-father and a grieving son over his late mother's custom motorcycle.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 70
programme.desc: When Sassy the dog turns up missing after a night filled with old and new boyfriends, Judge Rhonda faces former sisters-inlaw growling with anger and grief.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sisters in crisis: Judge Rhonda helps a family fight a path through drug addiction.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 9
programme.desc: Brothers in the flooring business try to convince Judge Rhonda that cutting vinyl is harder than laying carpet.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 58
programme.desc: When her cousin got out of jail on a theft charge, she tells Judge Rhonda that the list of what he owes her for rent, a cell phone, and her wrecked car is almost as long as his rap sheet.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Cousins who work together, put together a "Stop the Violence" event to help kids, but when that failed it started an argument that won't stop until they face Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 118
programme.desc: Cousins clash over an expensive Massage chair that was ruined because one of them was falling down drunk.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 149
programme.desc: When her younger cousin fell on hard times and needed money for a car, this woman dug into her pockets and handed over thousands of dollars which, to Judge Rhonda's surprise, was used as a down payment on a fancy luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A business woman with a thriving eyelash clientel claims her cousin has used her like a private ATM; Judge Rhonda probes both parties to see who will blink first.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 44
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda entertains a Rap Battle as a unique form of testimony in a case between cousins who have lost their harmony.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 34
programme.desc: A smoking Truck, worn out brakes and a muddy, rain slicked, dirt road drive a brother and sister straight to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 112
programme.desc: When a cousin's ex becomes his new boyfriend, Judge Rhonda has to sort through the mess of loans, baby supplies, broken car windows, burned up pies and a cut up wig.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 18
programme.desc: Will a Cheeseburger run end an engagement? Judge Rhonda presides.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to tie cousins back together who are at the end of their rope when expensive rock climbing equipment seems to fall off a cliff.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 12
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a clash of biblical proportion when a Pastor claims his sister stole $5,000 from his church.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 81
programme.desc: Sisters who only found each other when they were grown up are now at war over merchandise one "grabs real quick" from the other's boutique and Judge Rhonda has to settle the tab.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 82
programme.desc: Designer sunglasses that look really "fly" divide two cousins, inseparable since birth, because they might be fake; Judge Rhonda shines sunlight on the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When a dad takes a fancy, fast car from his son's car lot to take a lady friend on a 100 mph joy ride two of them dead end in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 107
programme.desc: Brothers ask Judge Rhonda for a DNA test to determine whether the man who died shielding them from gunfire was the biological father to both of them.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 84
programme.desc: When her comedian cousin brings a lady friend to her home recording studio for a drunken "play session," the damage done is no laughing matter for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 35
programme.desc: Foster care sisters who look after each other, work together at the same strip club and live together end up in Judge Rhonda's court over a car accident that might have been caused by drinking on the job.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Two cousins, Westside and Scoob, bring a car that looks like a shark bit the front bumper into Judge Rhonda's court with a mystery story about how the damage occured.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple in crisis comes to Judge Rhonda's court looking for answers about co-parenting their children after drugs, alcohol and infidelity have poisoned their relationship.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 98
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda settles the score when the parties, trash, liquor bottles and cigarette butts that ruined Grandma's house caused such a ruckus that neighbors had to call the police.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 38
programme.desc: Before heading to jail one sister arranged for her huge tax return to be deposited into her sister's bank account and that money's disappearance leads this family to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces sisters in crisis over one's homelessness and addiction to pain pills and the other's hopeless effort to help.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 123
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces cousins at odds over a house party with a stripper that got way out of hand.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 36
programme.desc: An Aunt, who has been like a second mother, drags her nephew into Judge Rhonda's court over a car he claims she stole from him.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda is on the case of a trip to a NYC flea market that turns ugly when one cousin claims the prices were too high, and blames her host for expensive damage to her car.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 16
programme.desc: A shady Food Truck deal drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 2
programme.desc: Burned wedding pictures and a mess of clothes dumped in the woods bring a married couple on the rocks into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 148
programme.desc: A younger sister hauls her older brother to Judge Rhonda's court to get him to pay back the many bar tabs she has paid when she's had to pick him up drunk from various bars around his college.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Got Murder?
programme.desc: Some bird watchers find a raven with a human eyeball in its mouth. Warrick and Grissom look into the circumstances of David's unusual and first autopsy.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Unfriendly Skies
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a passenger aboard a commercial airliner. They soon realize that the forensic evidence and passenger statements don't quite add up.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sex, Lies And Larvae
programme.desc: Sara and Grissom investigate the death of a woman, Kaye Shelton, found wrapped in a blanket in the mountains. With no way to confirm the time of death, Grissom relies on the insects found on her body to establish a timeline.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: I-15 Murders
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of Margaret Shorey at a supermarket, Grissom and Catherine stumble upon a serial killer who claims to have killed five women in supermarkets located along the I-15.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fahrenheit 932
programme.desc: Grissom receives a video tape from an inmate called Frank Damon who is on trial for the arson which resulted in his wife and son's death. On the tape, Damon claims that he is innocent and asks Grissom to help him.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Boom
programme.desc: A bomb in a brief case goes off in the lobby of an office building. The team piece together all the parts of this bomb to look for the maker's signature.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: To Halve And To Hold
programme.desc: A human bone is found in the desert by a man and his son playing fetch with their dog. Grissom and Catherine assemble a team to comb the area for more bones. Back at the lab, they piece together the dismembered body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: The team arrives at a charity fundraiser being held at the house of Portia Richmond, an ex-show girl who became very successful, where a body is found floating in the swimming pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Two Tough To Die
programme.desc: A Jane Doe is brutally attacked and raped before being left to die on the side of the road. With two bullets lodged in her brain, she is in a deep coma.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A thief is found dead from blunt force trauma to his head in a pottery store where he was evidently trying to crack a safe. The team dusts the store and finds the fingerprint of a girl who has been missing for the last 20 years.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: $35K O.B.O.
programme.desc: A couple who walk out of a fancy restaurant to their car are attacked and killed. When the team arrives on the scene, the only eyewitness is a young man who stayed behind to give his statements.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sounds Of Silence
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick investigate the apparent hit and run of a young man who they soon discover was deaf. Meanwhile, Nick and Catherine are attempting to solve a mass murder in a coffee shop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Justice Is Served
programme.desc: Catherine gets emotionally involved while investigating the death of a six-year-old girl at a carnival. Grissom, Nick and Warick take on the case of a jogger who was apparently attacked by an animal who knows how to use a scalpel.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burked
programme.desc: Tony Braun, the son of Las Vegas mogul Sam Braun, is found dead in his home, apparently victim of a drug overdose. But as the scene lacks all evidence normally connected to an overdose, the team soon suspects murder.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The detectives hunt for clues relating to a missing college freshman. Their hope of finding her alive diminishes as all of their leads on her turn cold.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Overload
programme.desc: A construction worker falls off a tall building but forensics determines that he died prior to the fall. Another case involves a boy who suffocates to death at his therapist's house late in the night.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Bully For You
programme.desc: When Barry Shickle is murdered in the bathroom of his school, Grissom, Catherine and Warrick investigate the case. They learn from the school counselor that Barry was a cruel bully. The victims of his bullying become the CSI's prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Scuba Doobie-doo
programme.desc: A scuba diver is found dead, fully equipped with an oxygen tank, on a tree in a burned forest.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Alter Boys
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at a spa while a young man is found burying dead bodies.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Caged
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a locked room while another died when her car is hit by a train.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Random Acts Of Violence
programme.desc: Warrick investigates the drive by murder of a young girl in his old neighborhood.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton, accesses 10 case files, revisiting the investigations with the police, detectives and other professionals who experienced them first hand.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton re-investigates the murder of 20-year-old Suzanne Greenhill, a deaf woman living in a community cut off from the world.
programme.sub-title: The Killing of a Deaf Girl

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2012, young Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter was found dead execution-style by his neighbour outside his home. With no forensic evidence or witnesses, detectives attempt to use surveillance footage to catch Porter's killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, close to an earlier shooting, the police refer to CCTV footage to help put together pieces of the puzzle and find the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When Carl Starke is shot dead close to his home in Florida, police turn to CCTV footage to help hunt his killer, resulting in a huge manhunt and a shocking on-camera interview.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In San Antonio, Christopher Duncan leaves his apartment never to return home. Police have little to go on until surveillance footage offers up the possible identity of a dangerous killer.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: The police search frantically when a respected member of the gay community goes missing.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When a freelance journalist goes missing, a rookie investigator searches for answers.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: Female investigators open up about some of the biggest cases they have cracked, beginning with a decade-long investigation into the death of a young woman.

programme.title: Murder She Solved
programme.desc: When 52-year-old nurse Mindy Schloss vanished from her home, it fell to dedicated detective Pam Perrenoud to bring her cruel killer to justice.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: An ex-convict gains full control of a mother.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Brooklyn, N.Y., a co-op owner, his handyman and a real estate owner fight over money and possible tenants, then one person goes missing while another gets away with murder.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: Police find charred human remains in a burn pile at a farmstead while investigating the disappearance of the homeowner and his live-in help.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: In Aspen, Colo., socialite Nancy Pfister invites Trey and Nancy Styler to rent out her chalet, but the living arrangement ends in a brutal beating death and accusations of murder.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home
programme.desc: After Brian Geddes invites 22-year-old Jordan Shaver to share his home, she decides to start a new life with someone else and Geddes goes missing.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Cheshire to investigate the opportunistic crimes that took place at a remote barn house in Congleton.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to South London to unravel the unbelievable story of Banaz Mahmod, a woman murdered by members of her own family.

programme.title: Written In Blood
programme.desc: Simon Toyne travels to Liverpool to unravel the notorious murder of James Bulger, who was abducted and killed by two 10-year-old boys.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Family Matters
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's father was a violent, abusive man. His mother doted on her young son. This episode delves deep into the psychology of Hitler as the narcissistic child who grew into a malignant psychopath full of rage and deep hatred.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Suicidal Maidens
programme.desc: Using extensive archival research, this program explores the squalid secrets he lied and killed to protect

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: German Bomber In Liverpool
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII militaria expert Stephen Taylor unearth artefacts from former military sites - starting with a German bomber found in Liverpool.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: WW1 Special
programme.desc: To mark 100 years since the end of the Great War, Suggs and Stephen excavate the site of a huge World War One transit camp at Morn Hill, outside Winchester.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers
programme.desc: Suggs and WWII expert Stephen hunt for souvenirs left by flying ace Douglas Bader and the legendary Duxford Fliers.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Bader and the Duxford Fliers

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Hull Blitz
programme.desc: Stephen Taylor and Suggs are up to their knees in mud in Lincolnshire as they dig up the remains of a Bolton Paul Defiant plane, shot down during the Hull Blitz.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Spitfire
programme.desc: Treasure Hunters Suggs and Stephen Taylor are on the trail of an iconic Mark IX Spitfire in Belgium.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Bombers in Suffolk
programme.desc: In WW2, Suffolk was home to 32 airfields that served as stations for US bombers. Suggs and Stephen hunt for relics of the visiting aircraft.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Forgotten Bomber
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Northern France looking for the remains of an RAF Fairey Battle bomber plane shot down during the days after Dunkirk.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Undercover
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 expert Stephen uncover more historical finds across the UK, this time looking for relics of the 1944 D-Day operation.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Pathfinder
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Cambridgeshire on the former airbase of the Pathfinders Force - the elite flying team whose WW2 exploits were kept top secret.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Bomb Factory
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen are back on the hunt for more relics from World War 2, and hope searching the site of a bomb factory won't yield anything too explosive.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Dress Rehearsal
programme.desc: In 1944, the south-west of England was packed with American troops training for D-Day. Suggs and Stephen discover more about this friendly invasion.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Fly Boys
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 militaria expert Stephen Taylor bring forgotten stories of World War II back to life by unearthing artefacts from sites across the UK.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Fall Of France
programme.desc: The Fall of France: By May 1940, Europe had been at war for nine months. Yet Britain and France declared war on Germany in September 1939 following Hitler's attack on Poland.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Battle Of Britain
programme.desc: The Battle of Britain: Taking place between August and September 1940, The Battle of Britain remains one of the most famous battles of World War Two.
